name: Dad's Wonderful Wild Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can Chicken with Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the wild rice and water. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 50 to 60 minutes or until the rice is tender and the water is absorbed.
2. Meanwhile, grease a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove the bacon from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
3. Discard all but 1 tablespoon of the drippings in the skillet. Add onions, celery, and carrot; cook and stir for 3 to 5 minutes or until tender. Stir in mushrooms; cook and stir for 1 to 2 minutes. Stir in soup and bacon.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Add cooked rice to the skillet; mix well. Spoon into the greased casserole dish; cover. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
